CHAR 1 x x x x
M2310_ECR_DVT_PULMNRY M2310 Emergent Care Reason- DVT, Pulmonary Embolus This field indicates that the reason the patient received emergent care was due to deep vein thrombosis, pulmonary embolus. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x x x
M2310_ECR_GI_PRBLM M2310 Emergent Care Reason- GI Issues This field indicates that the reason the patient received emergent care was due to GI bleeding, obstruction, constipation, impaction. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes)
